current.headline: Forty Cities Use AI to Review Building Permits. Nineteen Thousand Don't. The Math Isn't the Problem.

last_completed.headline: Your Builder Trained an AI on 1.4 Million Complaints. It Autocompletes the Apology. It Doesn't Fix the Leak.
